title: Book a consultation with Dr. Shristi
lead: Fastest path: WhatsApp Dr. Shristi with a photo of your reports. The form below works too — we'll call you back within 24 hours.

whatsapp_block.title: WhatsApp Dr. Shristi
whatsapp_block.body: Send a photo of your reports and a short note about what's going on. He writes back within 24 hours.
whatsapp_block.prefill: Hello, I'd like to book an appointment at SS Kidney Care. I'm sending my reports here.

opd_timings_note: OPD: 8–10 AM and 6–9 PM (Sambalpur clinic). Saturday morning only.

form.message_placeholder: Existing reports, ongoing treatment, what's worrying you — whatever helps us prepare.

success.title: Thanks, {name}.
success.body: We'll call you within 24 hours. A confirmation is on its way to {email}.
